---
title: "Long-term Perspective of Fisheries"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

The outputs generated by the WT Fisheries include **aggregated fisheries data** (2018-2022) from Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, Denmark, Sweden. 
These countries, as well as Ireland and Norway, supplied information on MPAs and offshore renewables and the fisheries management within such areas. The EU Commission compiled this information for the UK EEZ.
In the maps, values are only shown if more than 5 unique vessels are present during the selected time-period, otherwise the values are greyed out.

```{=html}
<div class="content-images-scroll" style="--content-image-height:600px;">
  <div class="content-images-row">
    <img src="assets/pm-knowledge-fisheries/TreeMap0.05_notSca_Tot_confNA_CWght_aggr_run_DEU.DNK.NLD.SWE.BEL_allYrs18-22_SpecAgg.png" alt="" style="height:600px;width:auto;" />
    <img src="assets/pm-knowledge-fisheries/TreeMap0.05_notSca_Tot_confNA_FiEff_aggr_run_DEU.DNK.NLD.SWE.BEL_allYrs18-22_GrsAgg.png" alt="" style="height:600px;width:auto;" />
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=KjTZRqc8QQKQdsP6MHInmg&layers=RuPfKLDBR32hx3hqYhyZkw&layerNames=Bottom%20Fishing%20Intensity%20,%20Subsurface%20%28OSPAR,%202020%29"></iframe>
```

:::
